items.summary: Fix the Upload Files button so it has a solid light blue background (#eff6ff) with no colored border (use a neutral/default border or no border). Fix the New Folder and Upload Folder buttons so they have a solid light yellow background (#fefce8) with no colored border. These styles must apply in both light and dark modes — do not let dark mode override or remove the background fills.
Update the APP_VERSION constant in frontend/src/lib/appVersion.ts from its current value to '0.4.151'.
